message:
feat(cli): add init command for project initialization

- Add `npx agentic-flow init` command to create .claude/ folder structure
- Creates settings.json with MCP server configuration
- Creates CLAUDE.md with project instructions
- Creates example-agent.md template
- Supports --force, --minimal, --help options
- Fix security vulnerabilities (command injection, IV reuse, SQL injection)
- Fix performance issues (O(n²) algorithms, race conditions)
- Add agent-booster type declarations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
